title: bandalux.com
description: Corporate website for Bandalux, sun protection manufacturer. Product catalog, multilingual and integration with distributor network.
body: ## The project [Bandalux](https://bandalux.com) is a Spanish manufacturer specializing in solar protection and window coverings for residential and commercial use. Its website acts as a multilingual corporate catalog (ES / FR / EN / IT) and contact channel for distributors, professionals and individuals. ## Solution Development on **WordPress** with custom design: - Catalog structured by product range: interior blinds, awnings, pergolas, motorized systems and screens - **Multilingual** with versions in Spanish, French, English and Italian - SEO optimized product pages with rich content and galleries - **Contact forms** segmented by profile (individual, professional, distributor) - Integration of corporate **video** and multimedia content - *Responsive* design adapted to mobile, tablet and desktop ## Featured products - **Airpure®** — curtain that purifies the air with mineral oxide activated by light - **LYNX app** — remote control of motorized blinds from the mobile - **EcoBandalux** — sustainable line oriented towards energy efficiency and reduction of plastics ## Stack WordPress · PHP · Custom CSS · WPML · HTML5 · Responsive design
